Sample Article

By Test Author

Introduction

This paragraph should survive cleaning. It contains the main body of the article and Readability should pick it up as the primary content.

A second paragraph reinforces the article boundaries. Readability's heuristics rely on having multiple paragraphs of substantive text to identify the content region.

A subsection

More content. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
